## Summary

- Describe the change clearly.

## Why this change

- Explain the user problem or maintenance need.

## Validation

- [ ] `gofmt -w .`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] Examples and docs updated if needed
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` guidance followed for implementation scope and risk review

## Risk review

- Migration or compatibility impact:
- Operational or schema risk:
- Follow-up work:
